dataAsOf.macro: 2026-07-06 (VIX real; F&G estimate — refresh live for CNN score)

regime.note: Carry-funded, semis-led melt-up near highs; leadership rotating OUT of tech into defensives/financials; softening labor + a hawkish new Fed chair = a widening left tail. Two-sided.

attention.title: SPY ~740 gamma flip is the line into Jul-17 OPEX
attention.what: IV-rank ~15 = positive-gamma pin near 745–750; the Jul-17 monthly holds ~2.36M put OI at 740; call wall ~750, ATH 760.
attention.why: Above 740 = calm grind (dealers sell strength/buy weakness); below 740 = negative-gamma JEX waterfall toward 720 then 700.

attention.title: Tech → Healthcare/Financials rotation accelerating
attention.what: 1-month: Technology −9% vs Healthcare +13%, Financials +7% — yet Tech is still the 3-month leader (+26%): classic Peaking-while-high.
attention.why: Leadership leaving high-multiple tech into defensives/financials on sticky inflation + hawkish Fed; equal-weight beat cap-weight by the widest margin in 6 years.

attention.title: Today's bounce is defensively-led — not a tech trend-turn (yet)
attention.what: The Jul-6 bounce is led by healthcare/staples/materials/utilities; Technology was −1.7% on the Jul-2 jobs-day session.
attention.why: Counter-trend / oversold (QQQ −3.9% 1M) inside a rotation. Confirms only if tech OUT-performs SPY/RSP and SPY reclaims 750→760.

attention.title: MSFT Jul 29 print — the diverged-laggard catalyst
attention.what: MSFT ~$390, −30% off the $555 high, fwd P/E ~21; Copilot fraud suit filed Jul 6; operating margin compressing 48.9%→46.3%.
attention.why: Q4 OM vs the −77bps seasonality anchor + the FY27 capex guide forks it: re-rate toward $450–500, or retest the $350s.

attention.title: Memory/semis are the entire engine (MU, NVDA, AVGO)
attention.what: MU is #1 in SPMO (10.7%) and #3 in QQQ; SPMO +27% YTD is the memory supercycle; software is lagging.
attention.why: SPMO/VGT/QQQ live or die on semis — a momentum-factor rollover hits all three at once.

attention.title: JPY carry near the intervention line = the left tail
attention.what: USD/JPY ~161.7 (late-June), at/through the ~160 MOF line; Japan already selling USTs; weak US jobs pull Fed-cut odds (narrowing the US–JP differential → yen strength).
attention.why: A MOF/BoJ response = sharp yen appreciation → carry unwind → high-beta tech air-pocket (the Aug-2024 template, i.e. the 'flash sales').

recommendations.subject: VGT / SPMO risk → QQQ
recommendations.rationale: Same regime, less single-name tail; VGT (beta 1.34) falls hardest on a de-gross. Trim-into-strength near highs, not add.

recommendations.subject: SPY 740 flip
recommendations.rationale: IV-rank ~15 = cheap hedges; define the downside via the Jul-17 put wall for the case SPY loses 740.

recommendations.subject: MSFT into Jul 29
recommendations.rationale: Contrarian, cheap, diverged — but binary on the margin/capex print. An event trade, not a momentum long.

recommendations.subject: USD/JPY 160
recommendations.rationale: The master risk switch. A break lower / any intervention headline = de-risk high-beta immediately.

events.consensus: rev $86.7–87.8B; Q4 OM ~44.5–45.6% (consensus / seasonality); '47%' is a bull-stretch

scenarios.name: inline
scenarios.expectedEffect: drifts; the FY27 capex guide decides the tone

scenarios.name: miss
scenarios.expectedEffect: retest the $350s; software-lag / show-me discount deepens

events.psychologyNote: Sell-the-news risk elevated — beats getting sold in a show-me AI-capex tape; the fraud suit adds headline overhang.

scenarios.name: break<740
scenarios.expectedEffect: put support rolls off → vol/direction release; waterfall risk

events.psychologyNote: Gamma pins hardest into OPEX; the 740 put wall is the fulcrum.

events.consensus: trend ~+40–60k after June +57k; watch revisions + participation

scenarios.name: hot
scenarios.expectedEffect: yields up, tech de-rates, adds yen risk

scenarios.name: cold
scenarios.expectedEffect: cut odds up but narrows the US–JP differential → yen strength / carry risk

events.psychologyNote: Both a hot and a cold print carry a JPY/tech tail via different channels.

psychology.read: Greed-ish tape near highs but on narrow, semis-only breadth and a carry-funded bid — the classic melt-up that periodically air-pockets. Reaction asymmetry favors punishing misses (sell-the-news) over rewarding beats.
inputs: recent flash-crash frequency (Mar −9%, Jun losing streak, ON Semi −23%)
JPY carry proximity to the ~160 intervention line
psychology.tiltOnProbabilities: Miss/downside scenarios shaded slightly heavier than pure option-implied, given sell-the-news + the carry tail.

QQQ.status: Near highs (−4.8%); balanced mega-cap; MU/NVDA/AMD carrying; MSFT drag 4.7%. Bounce = counter-trend until tech reclaims relative leadership.

SPMO.status: +27% YTD; momentum rotated into memory/semis (MU 10.7%, no MSFT/AAPL) — the purest supercycle long and the sharpest semis-reversal tail.

VGT.status: Highest beta (1.34), PE 41; NVDA+AAPL = 32%, MSFT 9.9%. Outruns on NVDA/AAPL, falls hardest on a de-gross (−7.6% 1M).

MSFT.status: $390, −30% off the high, fwd P/E ~21; Jul-29 print is the catalyst; Copilot fraud suit + margin compression overhang.

experimental.title: JPY-carry stress overlay (idea)
experimental.note: Model a USD/JPY 161→155 shock → expected high-beta tech drawdown using Aug-2024 downside beta. Not yet built — promote to a tool if recurring.
